notes: Captions target Memory Dungeon tone: dark fantasy memory-vault arcade, crystalline and marble-glass textures, restrained mix—paired with dont_modify reference_audio for timbre. Reference-assisted batch for 29 shipped targets. Paths resolve under scripts/audio-pipeline/reference-audio/ via materialize-reference-audio using src/renderer/assets/audio/dont_modify as the primary pack.
